data.raceName: THANKS CLAWS IN LEO SPRINT PBD
data.raceComments: {"comment":"7. CRONUS JEWEL is yet to break through in 17 starts but has run a number of placings. Racing consistently finishing in the money the last four starts. The form out of his last race has been franked. Overdue and expected to feature again. 5. HOMEBUSH WALDEN turned in a better run last time to find a minor placing (17.60) at this track behind Homebush Annie in a Class 0. Has the early speed to land on the pace and can stick on. Must be included in calculations. 2. SLAPSHOT SHELLY was out of the frame here most recently but can atone.","runners":[7,5,2],"exclusive":false}
